stable_semantics.name: namespace_scope
stable_semantics.guarantee: Every stored memory stays scoped to a namespace boundary on read, write, export, and replay surfaces.

stable_semantics.name: portable_export
stable_semantics.guarantee: Portable exports preserve semantic identity, provenance, and lineage without embeddings.

experimental_layers.name: summary_evidence_recall
experimental_layers.description: Compact summary and evidence rendering may evolve independently from stored runtime state.

object_model.description: Canonical durable runtime record for project-specific facts and operator rules.
Portable subset of visible runtime state for transfer between tools.
Deterministic lineage bundle for replay and branch workflows.
known_gaps: Replay is intentionally fail-closed to empty target namespaces.

guarantees.name: lineage_preservation
guarantees.description: Supersede and merge operations preserve lineage instead of destructive overwrite.

guarantees.name: contract_tagged_export
guarantees.description: Portable exports carry runtime contract metadata so downstream readers can reason about semantics and gaps.

known_gaps.note: Policy semantics exist today, but are not yet first-class typed runtime objects.
